title: Line creeper
content:
{{Top|leg}}
'''Line creepers''' were organisms similar to [[Conduit worm/Legends|conduit worms]] that lived in the [[Unknown Regions/Legends|Unknown Regions]]. They were segmented, slender worms that could grow to be as long as a [[Chiss/Legends|Chiss]]. They would chew into power and navigation cables and live on the electrical energy. They left a tell-tale amount of signature gas behind, and could not live in a vacuum.

By [[22 ABY/Legends|22 ABY]], the Chiss had unsuccessfully tried for years to exterminate them.

==Appearances==
*''[[Survivor's Quest]]'' {{Ab|Survivor's Quest (unabridged audiobook)}} {{1st|in book}}
